description: Derby Digital Client Onboarding Portal with Admin Dashboard. Bold, direct-response styled multi-step wizard for new home service contractor clients. Includes admin dashboard for tracking submissions and managing pipeline.

userStories.title: Initialize Next.js 14 project with Tailwind CSS and Supabase
userStories.description: Create a fresh Next.js 14 project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase client. Set up src/app directory, global styles with Derby Digital brand colors (primary: #2093FF to #0026FF blue gradient, dark backgrounds #0A0A0F, cards #1A1A2E). Install @supabase/supabase-js, @supabase/ssr. Create lib/supabase.ts using env vars. Root layout with Inter font and dark theme.
userStories.acceptCriteria: npm run build succeeds. Supabase client initializes. Tailwind configured with brand colors.

userStories.title: Create Supabase database schema
userStories.description: Create and run SQL migrations against DATABASE_URL. Tables: sessions (id uuid, token text unique, current_step int, status text, form_data jsonb, created_at, updated_at), documents (id uuid, session_id uuid FK, doc_type, file_name, storage_path, file_size, mime_type, created_at), submissions (id uuid, session_id uuid FK unique, business_name, owner_name, phone, email, address, city, state, zip, service_categories text[], service_area, monthly_budget, website_url, google_account_email, notes jsonb, pipeline_status text default 'new', submitted_at, created_at). Enable RLS. Create storage bucket 'documents'.
userStories.acceptCriteria: All tables exist in Supabase. RLS enabled. Storage bucket exists.

userStories.title: Build wizard layout and step provider
userStories.description: Create WizardProvider context managing current step (1-7), form data, navigation. Layout: progress bar with completion %, step titles, smooth fade/slide transitions. Dark #0A0A0F background, blue gradient accents #2093FF to #0026FF. Inter font. Derby Digital logo top left. Step number indicator. Must feel premium, not like a boring form.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Wizard renders with progress bar. Navigate forward/backward. Animations work. Mobile responsive.

userStories.title: Build Step 1: Welcome screen with session creation
userStories.description: Bold welcome step. Headline: 'Welcome to Derby Digital', subtext: 'Let's get you dominating your local market. This takes about 5 minutes.' Blue gradient CTA: 'Let's Go'. On click: POST /api/sessions to create session, store token in state + localStorage for resume. Overview of what they need (license, insurance, ID). Animated background. Feel elite.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Welcome renders. Click creates Supabase session. Token stored. Can resume on refresh.

userStories.title: Build Step 2: Business Information
userStories.description: Form: Business Name, Owner Full Name, Phone (formatted), Email, Address, City, State dropdown, ZIP. All required with validation. Auto-save via PATCH /api/sessions/[token] on blur. Blue-bordered inputs on dark cards. Validation errors in red. Smooth focus animations.
userStories.acceptCriteria: All fields validate. Data auto-saves to Supabase. Persists on refresh.

userStories.title: Build Step 3: Services and Trade
userStories.description: Selectable cards for: Electrician, Plumber, HVAC, Roofer, Painter, Remodeler, Handyman, General Contractor, Landscaper, Pest Control, Garage Door, Locksmith, Other (text input). Each card has icon. Also: Service Area text, Years in Business number, Employees dropdown. Auto-save.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Cards render and are selectable. Multiple selection works. Saves to session. Mobile 2-col grid.

userStories.title: Build Step 4: Document Uploads
userStories.description: Upload slots: Business License, Certificate of Insurance, Government ID, Utility Bill (optional). Drag-drop zones with click fallback. Upload to Supabase Storage bucket 'documents' via POST /api/upload. Save metadata to documents table. Accept PDF/JPG/PNG, max 10MB. Show progress and file name after upload.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Upload via drag-drop and click. Files in Supabase Storage. Metadata saved. Validation works.

userStories.title: Build Step 5: Ad Preferences and Online Presence
userStories.description: Fields: Website URL (optional), Google Account Email, Monthly Budget radio cards ($500-1000, $1000-2000, $2000-3000, $3000+), Current platforms checkboxes (Google Ads, Angi, HomeAdvisor, Thumbtack, Yelp, Facebook, None), Social links (Facebook, Instagram optional). Auto-save.
userStories.acceptCriteria: All fields render. Budget cards highlight on select. Data saves.

userStories.title: Build Step 6: Review and Submit
userStories.description: Display all info in sections: Business, Services, Documents (file names), Ad Prefs. Each section has Edit button jumping to that step. Large blue Submit button. On submit: mark session complete, create submissions row, show confetti animation.
userStories.acceptCriteria: All data displays. Edit buttons work. Submit creates record. Confetti plays.

userStories.title: Build Step 7: Confirmation
userStories.description: Thank you page: 'You're In! Welcome to Derby Digital.' Next steps: 1) We review (24hrs), 2) Set up Google ads, 3) Leads start coming. Contact: (502) 702-6268, jahan@derbydigital.us. 'Back to Derby Digital' link. Celebratory and premium feel.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Confirmation renders after submit. Next steps shown. Contact info correct.

userStories.title: Build all API routes
userStories.description: Routes: POST /api/sessions (create, return token), GET /api/sessions/[token] (get data), PATCH /api/sessions/[token] (update form_data + step), POST /api/upload (file to Storage + documents table), POST /api/submit (finalize, create submissions row), GET /api/admin/submissions (paginated, auth required). Use service role key server-side.
userStories.acceptCriteria: All routes work. Full CRUD flow functional.

userStories.title: Build Admin Dashboard - Login and Layout
userStories.description: Route /admin with password login (env ADMIN_PASSWORD default 'derby2026'). Dashboard layout: sidebar (Dashboard, Submissions), header with branding, main content. Dark theme. Auth cookie. Protect /admin/* with middleware.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Login works. Auth persists. Sidebar nav works. Protected routes redirect.

userStories.title: Build Admin Dashboard - Submissions Table
userStories.description: Table at /admin/submissions: Business Name, Owner, Phone, Email, Services, Status badge (new=blue, in_progress=yellow, active=green), Date. Click expands detail panel. Search by name. Filter by status. Sort newest first.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Table renders. Badges correct. Search/filter work. Responsive.

userStories.title: Build Admin Dashboard - Submission Detail and Documents
userStories.description: Detail view: all business info, services, documents with download links (signed URLs from Storage), ad prefs, date, status dropdown to change pipeline_status. Internal notes (save to notes jsonb). Image previews inline, PDF download buttons.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Details render. Documents downloadable. Status changeable. Notes saveable.

userStories.title: Build Admin Dashboard - Overview Stats
userStories.description: Dashboard home /admin: cards for Total Submissions, New count, In Progress count, Active count, This Week, This Month. Simple bar chart (CSS or lightweight lib) for submissions per week last 8 weeks. Blue gradient cards with count-up animation.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Stats correct from DB. Chart renders. Cards animate.

userStories.title: Polish, responsive, and final QA
userStories.description: Mobile responsive (375px, 768px, 1024px). Loading skeletons. Error handling with friendly messages. Test full flow end to end. Meta tags: title 'Derby Digital - Client Onboarding'. Build passes zero errors.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Full flow works. Mobile responsive. No errors. Build succeeds.
